author: claude
content: Hater round 1 (5/5) complete. Diagnosis: file-level tree was byte-perfect but tests+wiring mis-placed across commit boundaries -> 4/5 commits fail isolation (effect-before-cause). Real bugs: c4 Major (_shared_prototype_entries reachable RuntimeError on narrow configs), c4 minors (which-geckodriver dead guard, honey-prop cross-node residue), c1 doc drift (copyFunctionArity fiction + vector-count/trip mismatches), c3 ValueError unwrapped + unused import, c5 hides a default-behavior change. User approved corrected partition: pull settings schema+generator c3->c2; move shared-prototype/attribution tests c2->c3; move task_manager clean+assign wiring c4->c3; move Function default-classification c5->c4; fix each finding in its flagging commit. Rebuild on scratch stealth-reshaped-v2, re-hater changed commits, then re-push #1154. Findings detail in datadir/hater-commit-{1..5}-*.md.
